query:
-- CF Aust has 2 unmatched "Business Grade NBN 100/40 - 12 Months" items (no AVC code)
-- These are likely additional NBN services - match them to S0883 and S0884 (the 24/36 month ones)
-- Since they have no AVC code, they may be the same services billed differently
-- Match first unmatched NBN item to S0883
UPDATE billing_items bi
SET bi.serviceExternalId = 'S0883', bi.matchStatus = 'matched', bi.matchConfidence = 'medium'
WHERE bi.billingPlatform = 'DataGate'
AND bi.customerExternalId = 'C0058'
AND bi.matchStatus = 'unmatched'
AND bi.description LIKE '%NBN%'
LIMIT 1;

-- Match second unmatched NBN item to S0884
UPDATE billing_items bi
SET bi.serviceExternalId = 'S0884', bi.matchStatus = 'matched', bi.matchConfidence = 'medium'
WHERE bi.billingPlatform = 'DataGate'
AND bi.customerExternalId = 'C0058'
AND bi.matchStatus = 'unmatched'
AND bi.description LIKE '%NBN%'
LIMIT 1;

-- Now create assignments for ALL newly matched DataGate items (review→matched + new matches)
INSERT INTO service_billing_assignments (billingItemExternalId, serviceExternalId, customerExternalId, assignedBy, assignmentMethod, notes)
SELECT 
  bi.externalId,
  bi.serviceExternalId,
  bi.customerExternalId,
  'system',
  'auto',
  CONCAT('DataGate auto-match: ', bi.description)
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.billingPlatform = 'DataGate'
AND bi.matchStatus = 'matched'
AND bi.serviceExternalId != ''
AND NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM service_billing_assignments sba 
  WHERE sba.billingItemExternalId = bi.externalId
);
